3219890.name: Critter Caboodle
3219890.description:
Critter Caboodle is a unique incremental game where you randomly find silly looking critters through hatching eggs. Give them love, furniture, weapons, potions and upgrade them through an intricate progression system. Unlock new locations and mechanics the more you play!

Can you find them all?

Features

  • Hatch Eggs - Open up eggs to find various things like critters and food inside, with the possibility to find ultra rare critters!

  • Unique Creatures - Find and collect critters through hatching eggs. Give them various items or just watch them walk around the environment and do Their Thing.

  • Play with your critters - Pet or shake them around? Give them toys and weapons to play with as they react to you and to other critters around them.

  • Multiple handcrafted location - Place critters in a farm or a grassy forest. Decorate your play area with furniture that your critters will love.

  • Intricate upgrade system - Besides numerical upgrades acquire unique game mechanics and items through an interconnecting upgrade system.
